mapper.sql:
ORDER BY
t.title t.completed
CASE t.priority WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 3 WHEN 'MEDIUM' THEN 2 ELSE 1 END
t.deadline t.created_at
ASC DESC
mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.title, t.completed, t.priority, t.deadline, t.created_at, c.id AS category_id, c.name AS category_name, c.color AS category_color FROM todos t INNER JOIN category c ON c.id = t.category_id ORDER BY t.created_at DESC

SELECT t.id, t.title, t.completed, t.priority, t.deadline, t.created_at, c.id AS category_id, c.name AS category_name, c.color AS category_color FROM todos t INNER JOIN category c ON c.id = t.category_id WHERE t.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO todos (title, completed, priority, category_id, deadline) VALUES (#{title}, COALESCE(#{completed}, FALSE), #{priority}, #{category.id}, #{deadline})
mapper.update: UPDATE todos SET title = #{title}, completed = #{completed}, priority = #{priority}, category_id = #{category.id}, deadline = #{deadline} WHERE id = #{id}
